notes: Local Docker WordPress at http://localhost:8088. Primary site of the multisite network (blog_id=1). Disabled 2026-07-14 in favor of the dedicated techtools subsite; primary is now admin/hub only.
Production catfancast.com. External hosted site (not part of local multisite). Requires CATFANCAST_WP_* env vars set in .env and website_memory/catfancast.com.md present.
Production animefancast.com. External hosted site (not part of local multisite). Requires ANIMEFANCAST_WP_* env vars set in .env and website_memory/animefancast.com.md present.
